title: Chat surface wired to the agentic query loop (tool-call cards, stop/retry)
description: FFI session-scoped agentic loop with sandbox-safe file-tool allowlist; stream tool-call events; SwiftUI chat with tool cards, stop, retry. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/2

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: Implementation complete: PR https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/pull/21 (feat/agentic-chat). Close when merged.

title: Remote session attach: live events, input forwarding, remote approvals
description: Attach to daemon sessions: live event stream in the chat surface, input forwarding, remote approval sheets. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/8

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: PR #27 open: remote session attach — typed coven.daemon.v1 session client (list/events/input/kill), chat-surface transcript from stream-json frames, approval bar with y/n forwarding, gate enforcement.

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: Shipped in PR #27 (da6ee0d): typed coven.daemon.v1 session client (list/events/input/kill, 4 MiB cap with loud overflow error), stream-json transcript mapping with ANSI/CR handling, 2s poll loop, heuristic approval bar with y/n forwarding, all traffic gated through gateForSessionTraffic().

title: Pairing flow with mandatory coven.daemon.v1 handshake
description: Enforce coven.daemon.v1 handshake before session traffic; pairing UX; Keychain persistence; unpair/re-pair. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/7

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: PR #26 open: coven.daemon.v1 handshake (DaemonHandshake/DaemonIdentity FFI), Keychain-backed pairing with confirm/verify/unpair UX, gateForSessionTraffic() enforcement point for pocket-1qn. QR scan deferred as follow-up.

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: Shipped in PR #26 (2a38f78): coven.daemon.v1 handshake enforcement, DaemonIdentity FFI, Keychain pairing with confirm/verify/unpair, gateForSessionTraffic() for remote-attach to build on. QR scan deferred.

title: Daemon transport: Tailscale/SSH tunnel MVP
description: Reach a Coven daemon over Tailscale or SSH tunnel; connection config UI; reachability probe; upstream authenticated-listener design. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/6

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: PR #25 open: probe_daemon FFI (health-check wire format, classified failure states), Companion tab, upstream design issue coven#463. Awaiting CI.

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: Shipped in PR #25 (ed783d3): daemon reachability probe (DaemonProbeState FFI), Companion tab with persisted host/port + actionable failure copy, tunnel-first MVP transport. Upstream auth listener design filed as OpenCoven/coven#463.

title: Session browser: resume, fork, delete
description: Session list from engine store; resume with transcript restore; fork at head; delete. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/5

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: Claimed: implementing session browser (resume/fork/delete) against the engine session store.

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: Shipped in PR #23 (merge 00f9c94): two-layer session store (JSONL transcripts + SQLite index), resume/fork/delete UI, async FFI list/delete off main thread.

title: Native diff viewer with per-hunk accept/reject
description: Native diff rendering, per-hunk accept/reject through the engine. In flight on feat/diff-viewer. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/4

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: Note: committed-but-unPRed work exists on branch feat/diff-viewer (070bf7b, stacked on unmerged 9a0f8c3 auth feature) in worktree /private/tmp/coven-diff-viewer from a parallel session, idle since Jul 21 13:36. Coordinate/land that before starting fresh.

title: Permission modes + approval sheets (default / accept-edits / plan)
description: Engine permission model gating tool execution; approval sheets; per-session mode picker. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/3

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: Shipped in PR #22 (merged as 14c3014). Closes GH issue #3.

title: On-device git workspaces (libgit2; HTTPS PAT + SSH keys)
description: Clone/fetch/pull/branch/commit/push on-device via libgit2; credentials in Keychain; workspace list UI; FFI workspace paths for engine file tools. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/1

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: PR #24 open: libgit2 workspaces (clone/pull/commit/push/branch), Repos tab, chat binds to selected repo. Awaiting CI.

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: Shipped in PR #24: libgit2 workspaces (clone/pull FF-only/commit/push/branches), Repos tab with Keychain creds, chat binds to selected workspace.

title: TestFlight beta (subject to the licensing gate)
description: Resolve GPL-3.0 App Store distribution per docs/LICENSING.md first; App Store Connect setup; beta criteria. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/19

title: iPad three-pane layout
description: Adaptive iPad layout: sessions | chat | context panes, keyboard shortcuts, pointer support. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/18

title: App Intents / Shortcuts / Spotlight
description: App Intents (start session, continue goal, ask in workspace); Shortcuts donations; Spotlight indexing. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/17

title: Live Activities + Dynamic Island; approval notifications
description: Live Activity + Dynamic Island for active sessions/goals; time-sensitive approval notifications with approve/deny actions. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/16

title: Session sharing via unlisted Gists
description: Export redacted transcript bundle; create unlisted gist with device-held token; copy link; revoke via delete. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/15

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: PR #28 open: markdown export + mandatory Rust redaction pass (10 rule categories, labeled findings), GistClient/GistShareModel with device-held token, ShareSessionSheet with preview + revoke.

comments.author: Val Alexander
comments.text: Shipped in PR #28 (09bf285): markdown transcript export, mandatory 10-rule Rust redaction pass with labeled findings (no-panic compile, single scan), unlisted gist upload with device-held Keychain token, link copy, per-share revoke.

title: Remote MCP servers (streamable HTTP/SSE + OAuth)
description: Engine MCP client over streamable HTTP/SSE (no stdio on iOS); OAuth tokens in Keychain; server management UI; permission-mode aware. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/14

title: On-device /goal with Live Activity progress
description: /goal command driving the engine goal loop within iOS background limits; Live Activity progress; suspend/resume. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/13

title: Familiar companion (7 archetypes)
description: Port the coven familiar companion: 7 archetypes, selection UI, persona layered onto sessions, persisted per profile. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/12

title: Memory: AGENTS.md injection, memdir browser
description: Inject workspace AGENTS.md into system context; browse/edit engine memdir; per-workspace toggle. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/11

title: Goal handoff between device and desktop
description: Hand off running sessions/goals between device and daemon with transcript+workspace reconciliation and takeover confirmation. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/10

title: Anthropic subscription access via the companion's claude CLI login
description: Route through the companion's signed-in claude CLI (ClaudeCliProvider); never import OAuth tokens on-device; picker gated on pairing. https://github.com/OpenCoven/coven-pocket/issues/9
